caption: A motion graphic features a dark blue background with abstract white lines, circles, and triangles. Two stylized red globes appear on the screen; the globe on the left is larger and encircled by a red orbital ring, while the smaller globe on the right is positioned further east. Below each globe is a red circle containing the white text "DAILY ROUND-UP" in a bold, italicized font. Beneath these red circles, the word "INTERNATIONAL" is written in smaller white capital letters. Faint, semi-transparent text reading "DAILY ROUND-UP" is repeated across the background in various positions. As the sequence progresses, the elements remain static in their positions, but the lighting and opacity of the background text shift slightly, creating a subtle sense of motion and depth within the digital composition.
